session.user: Run `make fast-ci` from the repository root `/home/runner/work/erk/erk` and report all results.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make fast-ci` command from the repository root and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run fast CI checks from repository root

session.assistant:
**All fast-ci checks PASSED**
Summary of results:
- **Lint**: All checks passed - **Format Check**: 1730 files already formatted - **Prettier Check**: All matched files use Prettier code style - **Markdown Check**: OK - **Exec Reference Check**: .claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md is up to date - **Type Check (ty)**: All checks passed - **Unit Tests (erk)**: 6026 passed in 14.81s - **Tests (erk-dev)**: 136 passed in 6.06s - **Tests (erk-statusline)**: 115 passed in 0.80s - **Tests (erk-mcp)**: All passed - **AGENTS.md Standard Check**: PASSED - All CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md files properly paired (19 files checked, 0 violations)
All checks passed successfully with no issues detected.
